app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.60 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for steadier playback loading, better recovery, and a cleaner home experience.
releaseNotes: Playback now keeps more valid stream choices available without blocking the first playable result
Playback request headers are preserved more consistently for stream playback
Slow but valid endpoints get more request time while bad responses still fail cleanly
Anime and Sports tabs are disabled by default and can be enabled from Customize Tabs
Support is now shown as a homepage module instead of a launch popup or system notification
The home hero and support module now use subtle banner-tinted glass styling
Stream parser tests were refreshed for the merged response shape

items.title: The Cube 2.0.60
items.message: Playback loading, recovery timing, and homepage support were improved.

items.title: Active Development Notice
items.message: THE CUBE is under heavy, active development. Expect frequent updates, sometimes multiple times a week, as features are added, bugs are fixed, and things get reworked. Breaking changes, UI shifts, and rough edges are part of the process right now.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
